product.description:
PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS:
- High Strength Tempered Glass
- Track your progress using the OKOK App
- Up to 70 different functions
- All new ABS material
- Weighing capacity up to 180kg
- Battery included (2x AAA)
- Units: KG (Kilograms)/LB (Pounds)/ST (Stone)
- Size: 26 CM x 26 CM x 3 CM
- Up to 8 users

OKOK INTERNATIONAL APP via Bluetooth:
- Compatible with Android & IOS
- Generates report and provides health advice based on measurements
- Weekly report of weight trend, providing graphical data
- 20 key body composition analysis, including: BMI, body fat %, Muscle mass, water content

- NOTE: The scale is only effective on hard surfaces. Accuracy will greatly differ if the scale is placed on soft surfaces like carpets
- DISCLAIMER: Warranty does not cover wear and tear of Russell Taylors products

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
- This product is backed with a 1 year limited warranty under Russell Taylors. All Russell Taylors products are to be used for household use, warranty will be void if the product is used for commercial use.
- Warranty Registration and Terms & Conditions: https://www.russelltaylors.co.uk/pages/warranty-registration
